tests.name: Fresh long-story 'before/after sleep-score' video vs. fatigued hero video
tests.single_variable: Prospecting video creative (control = current 0:30 hero video; treatment = new long-story video built on the before/after sleep-score structure). Audience, placement, bid, landing all held constant.
tests.hypothesis_restated: New on-pattern creative lifts prospecting CTR back toward 1.3%+ and lowers prospecting CPA for LAL-1%.

guardrail: Landing CVR must not fall (message-match check)

sample_size.per_variant: ~39,000 clicks-equivalent; at ~1% CTR ≈ 3.9M impressions/variant per ab-testing baseline×lift table (1% baseline, 20% lift = 39k/variant)
sample_size.note: CTR sample is impression-driven and reached fast at this spend; CPA significance is the slower read.

duration.reason: Meta prospecting delivers the impression volume for CTR significance within ~1 week; hold to ~2 weeks so CPA (the slower, conversion-based metric) also reaches its sample. Do not call early.

tests.allocation: 50/50 (standard A/B; treatment is on-pattern, low risk)
tests.pre_commit: Sample size fixed in advance; no peeking-and-stopping. Call only at the pre-committed sample (the Peeking Problem).

tests.name: Frequency cap + LAL-3% -> LAL-1% reallocation
tests.single_variable: Delivery: cap prospecting frequency at ~3/wk and shift LAL-3% budget into LAL-1%.
tests.hypothesis_restated: Fewer wasted impressions lower blended CPA without losing valued reach.
tests.isolation: Applied at the audience/budget layer, not the creative layer — does not confound the H1 creative read. Tracked as a parallel observed change, not a clean RCT.
tests.note: Lightweight; reversible if purchase volume dips.

pre_launch_checklist: Both video variants QA'd; treatment specs validated downstream in variant_gen
Tracking verified before spend (handled in launch_plan)
Guardrail thresholds set with stop rules
confound_control: H1 isolates creative; H2 isolates delivery. H3 (quiz routing) deliberately deferred to week 8 so it doesn't muddy either read.
source: ab-testing / Test One Thing + Metrics Selection + Sample Size table + Traffic Allocation + Pre-Launch Checklist + Peeking Problem
